body:
## Summary
- add `--focus-pro-lifetime-relaunch-parity` to `scripts/validate-content.js`
- emit dedicated Pro Lifetime relaunch counters for bare `true` rejection, structured receipt-backed records, provider-backed restore/receipt revalidation, fail-closed clearing, and native provider wiring
- add routing and runtime tests that execute the focused validator and assert its JSON summary

## Validation
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-pro-lifetime-relaunch-parity`
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" node --test tests/content-test-script-routing.test.js tests/v1-1-pro-iap.test.js scripts/monetization.test.js --test-name-pattern "Pro Lifetime|proLifetime|relaunch|receipt|stored record|focus-pro-lifetime"`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `git diff --check HEAD^`
title: test: focus Pro Lifetime relaunch validation
